landing.hero.title: Udaan
landing.hero.subtitle: Support in crisis. Discovery of purpose. Confluence of community.
landing.hero.subtitle.en: Support in crisis. Discovery of purpose. Confluence of community.
landing.crisis.heading: What help do you need?
crisis.title: How can we help you today?
crisis.subtitle: You are not alone. Let us find the right support for you.
crisis.job-loss.desc: Help finding employment and government schemes
crisis.no-food.desc: Immediate food assistance and ration schemes
crisis.no-money.desc: Financial aid schemes and emergency help
crisis.health.desc: Free treatment and health insurance schemes
crisis.purpose.desc: Find your path, connect with community
crisis.lost2: I don't know what to do
emergency.heading: Emergency Contacts
emergency.title: Emergency Contacts
emergency.subtitle: Immediate help is available. All numbers are free.
triage.heading: Let us help you
triage.title: Tell us about yourself
triage.subtitle: This helps us find the right government schemes for you.
triage.state: Which state do you live in?
triage.urgency: How soon do you need help?
triage.reassure.job-loss: Don't worry. Millions have found a way out of this situation. We'll connect you with the right government schemes.
triage.reassure.no-food: You're not alone. Immediate food assistance is available. Let's help you right now.
triage.reassure.no-money: Financial crisis is temporary. Many government schemes are designed to help you.
triage.reassure.health: Your health comes first. There are many free treatment government schemes.
triage.reassure.lost: Feeling lost isn't weakness. You've come to the right place. Together we'll find a way.
triage.reassure.purpose: Searching for purpose is the greatest strength. Let's find your path together.
urgency.urgent.desc: Need help in a few days
schemes.heading: Schemes for You
schemes.title: Government Schemes for You
schemes.subtitle: Based on your profile, you may be eligible for these schemes.
schemes.none: No schemes found. Please try changing your details.
schemes.noMatch: No schemes found matching your profile. Try updating your details.
mental_health.heading: Mental Health Support
mental_health.title: You are not alone
mental_health.subtitle: Take a moment. Breathe. Help is here.
mental_health.breathing.title: Breathing Exercise
mental_health.grounding.title: Grounding Exercise (5-4-3-2-1)
compass.heading: Purpose Compass
compass.title: Discover Your Purpose
compass.subtitle: Five questions. No right answers. Just what feels true to you.
compass.q1: What made you feel alive before work defined you?
compass.q1.en: What did you enjoy before work defined you?
compass.q2: What does your neighborhood need most?
compass.q3: What would you do if money wasn't the question?
compass.q3.en: What would you do if money wasn't the question?
compass.q4: What skill do you have that others need?
compass.q4.en: Which problem of people bothers you the most?
compass.q5: How do you want to be remembered in your mohalla?
compass.q5.en: What do you want to be known for?
compass.result.title: Your Purpose Map
compass.result.subtitle: Here is what lights you up.
missions.heading: Missions
missions.title: Missions for You
missions.subtitle: Real things you can start today in your community.
